# Ted's Voice Academy

> Ted's Voice Academy is a professional voice coaching studio in Lacey, Washington, founded and operated by Ted Chamberlain. Ted offers private singing lessons, speaking coaching, ensemble coaching, and workshops for all ages and skill levels. He is the author of The Adaptive Voice Framework (AVF), creator of the PASS Profile professional communication assessment, developer of Intonation Lab ear training software, and creator of Riser Chart riser placement tool for chorus directors.

## About Ted Chamberlain

Ted Chamberlain has been teaching voice since 1988 and directing choruses since 1987 — nearly four decades of experience coaching over 1,000 singers, speakers, and ensemble performers. He holds a BA in K-12 Music Education (with endorsements in vocal, instrumental, and general music) and a BA in Vocal Performance. He is a National Board Certified Teacher (NBCT). Ted taught in public schools from 1988–2016 and 2018–2024, ran a full vocal studio in Puyallup, WA (2014–2018), and founded Ted's Voice Academy in Lacey, WA in July 2023. He is the 2025 Lacey South Sound Chamber Entrepreneur of the Year and was named a Top 3 Vocal Instructor in Washington State by BusinessRate (Google Reviews, 2025). He is a member of the National Association of Teachers of Singing (NATS) and directs Voices of the Sound, a community chorus.

## Services

- **Private Singing Lessons**: One-on-one vocal coaching for all skill levels, ages, and genres. Ted uses the Adaptive Voice Framework (AVF), a five-pillar approach covering technique, expression, health, performance, and artistry.
- **Speaking Coaching**: Voice training for professionals, presenters, and anyone who wants to communicate with more clarity and confidence.
- **Ensemble Coaching**: Coaching for choirs, quartets, and vocal groups — including blend, balance, interpretation, and performance skills.
- **Workshops**: Group workshops on vocal technique, performance skills, and vocal health for organizations, schools, and community groups.
- **Vocal Health Hub**: Educational resources on vocal health, hydration, rest, vocal hygiene, and when to seek professional medical advice.

## The Adaptive Voice Framework (AVF)

The Adaptive Voice Framework is Ted's proprietary vocal development methodology, published as a book available on Amazon. The AVF is built on Five Pillars (Technique, Expression, Health, Performance, Artistry) and uses Eight Dials — adjustable elements that shape a singer's unique sound. The framework adapts to each student rather than imposing a one-size-fits-all approach.

- Book: "The Adaptive Voice Framework" on Amazon: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0GD2SH8J5
- Book: "AVF Guide: The Essentials" — The entry-point guide for singers and speakers. Covers the Five Pillars and Eight Dials in a concise, accessible format. Paperback $14.95 / Kindle $4.99. Amazon: https://www.amazon.com/AVF-Guide-Essentials-Ted-Chamberlain-ebook/dp/B0GTRZTB75
- Book: "AVF Singer's Guide: Barbershop Harmony" — Applies the AVF framework to barbershop quartet and chorus singing. Covers lock and ring, formant matching, part-specific guidance, and a coaching decoder. Paperback $14.95 / Kindle $4.99. Amazon: https://www.amazon.com/AVF-SINGERS-Barbershop-Adaptive-Framework-ebook/dp/B0GTRY4NDH

## The PASS Profile

The PASS Profile (Personal Authentic Speaking Style) is a professional communication assessment created by Ted. It measures 40 communication traits across 6 domains through 60 workplace scenarios, delivering a personalized 35–48 page PDF report revealing each person's unique communication fingerprint. Available at https://pass.tedsvoiceacademy.com

## Intonation Lab

Intonation Lab is a browser-based ear training tool for singers, created by Ted. It uses real-time pitch detection, AI coaching feedback, and just intonation targets to help singers develop precise intonation. Features include 29 intervals and chords (13 melodic intervals + 16 chord types), 13 timbres, a beat frequency circle visualization, cymatics display, pitch tracker with recording and playback, drone mode, JI vs ET comparison, dark mode, staff notation, piano keyboard display, and a 52-exercise guided curriculum with four difficulty levels. A free demo is available with three intervals and full visualizations, no sign-up required. Installable as a Progressive Web App with offline support. Licenses range from $99 (single) to $999 (chorus/40 users). Available at https://intlab.tedsvoiceacademy.com

## Riser Chart

Riser Chart is a browser-based drag-and-drop riser placement tool for chorus directors, worship leaders, show choir directors, and ensemble managers, created by Ted. It features up to 24 color-coded voice parts, singer photos with timbre/resonance visual rings, four layout styles (straight, curved, grid, free-form), up to 10 rows with 40 spots each, 200+ singers, five auto-arrange templates, canvas annotations (text, rectangles, circles), singer links for proximity relationships (together/apart), batch editing with multi-select, groups and ensemble management, events for organizing formations by concert, unlimited formations, dark mode, read-only share links, multi-account support, CSV roster import/export, JSON backup/restore, opt-in Cloud Sync across devices, branded PNG/JPG/PDF exports with custom accent colors and logos, print-friendly view, guided onboarding tour, and keyboard shortcuts. By default, all data is stored locally on the user's device. If the user enables the optional Cloud Sync feature (found in the Export menu), a copy is also stored securely in the cloud. One-time purchase of $99 with no subscription. Version 4.11, built from 40+ years of directing experience. Available at https://riser.tedsvoiceacademy.com — Product page: https://tedsvoiceacademy.com/riser-chart/ — Support: support@tedsvoiceacademy.com

## Shop

Ted's Voice Academy offers several products: The Adaptive Voice Framework book, the AVF Guide Series (AVF Guide: The Essentials and AVF Singer's Guide: Barbershop Harmony), the PASS Profile assessment, Intonation Lab ear training tool, and Riser Chart riser placement tool for chorus directors. Additional products (Vocal Fit conditioning exercises) are in development.
